import os
import torch
from transformers import AutoProcessor, Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration

model_path = "/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct"
print("Loading processor...")
processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained(model_path, trust_remote_code=True)
print("Processor loaded.")
tokenizer = processor.tokenizer
print("Special tokens:", tokenizer.all_special_tokens[:30])
print("Special tokens map:", tokenizer.special_tokens_map)
print("Vocabulary size:", tokenizer.vocab_size)

# Check box-related tokens
for token in ["<box>", "</box>", "<|box_start|>", "<|box_end|>", "<point>", "</point>"]:
    tid = tokenizer.convert_tokens_to_ids(token)
    print(f"{token} -> id={tid}")

# Check if tokenizer has apply_chat_template
print("\nChat template:")
test_msg = [{"role": "user", "content": [{"type": "text", "text": "Click the button"}]}]
text = processor.apply_chat_template(test_msg, tokenize=False)
print("Prompt:", text)

# Tokenize
encoded = processor(text=text, return_tensors="pt")
print("Encoded keys:", encoded.keys())
if 'input_ids' in encoded:
    print("Input ids shape:", encoded.input_ids.shape)
    print("Tokens sample:", tokenizer.convert_ids_to_tokens(encoded.input_ids[0][:30]))

# Load model sample to see output format
print("\nLoading model (small test)...")
model = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(
    model_path,
    torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16,
    device_map="auto",
    trust_remote_code=True,
    attn_implementation="flash_attention_2" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "sdpa"
)
print("Model loaded. Testing inference with dummy image...")

# Create a dummy black image
import numpy as np
from PIL import Image
img = Image.fromarray(np.zeros((100, 100, 3), dtype=np.uint8))

messages = [
    {
        "role": "user",
        "content": [
            {"type": "image", "image": img},
            {"type": "text", "text": "Click the button"}
        ]
    }
]

text_prompt = processor.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False)
inputs = processor(text=[text_prompt], images=[img], return_tensors="pt").to(model.device)

with torch.no_grad():
    generated_ids = model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=128)
generated_ids_cut = generated_ids[0][len(inputs.input_ids[0]):]
decoded = processor.batch_decode(generated_ids_cut.unsqueeze(0), skip_special_tokens=False)[0]
print("Generated output (raw):", decoded)

# Also show with special tokens
print("Full output with special tokens:", processor.decode(generated_ids[0], skip_special_tokens=False))
